result:
I have enough to map the full graph. Here's the call graph from `cli/src/commands/build.rs` to the SQLite layer.

## Call graph: `mneme build` â†’ SQLite

```
run (cli/src/commands/build.rs:149)
â”œâ”€â”€ resolve_project (4685)
â”œâ”€â”€ count_candidate_files (5225)              [pre-flight pruning]
â”œâ”€â”€ ProjectId::from_path                      [common crate]
â”œâ”€â”€ PathManager::default_root                 [common crate]
â”œâ”€â”€ BuildLock::acquire                        [crate::build_lock]
â”œâ”€â”€ make_client_for_build (4728)              [if --dispatch]
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ client.is_running()                   [crate::ipc::IpcClient]
â”œâ”€â”€ run_dispatched (259)                      [supervisor path]
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ ModelProbes::probe (4520)
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ load_project_ignore (5188)
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ walkdir::WalkDir + is_ignored / project_ignore_matches
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ Language::from_filename               [parsers crate]
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ client.request(IpcRequest::DispatchJob {Job::Parse}) / JobQueueStatus
â”‚       â””â”€â”€ â€¦ work happens in supervisor; THIS path does not touch SQLite locally â€¦
â”‚
â””â”€â”€ run_inline (393)                          [classic in-process pipeline]
    â”œâ”€â”€ BuildChildRegistry::new (4906)
    â”œâ”€â”€ build_state::load                     [crate::commands::build_state]
    â”œâ”€â”€ spawn_ctrl_c_killer_with_state (5069)
    â”œâ”€â”€ ModelProbes::probe (4520)
    â”‚
    â”œâ”€â”€ â”€â”€ STORE BOOTSTRAP â”€â”€
    â”œâ”€â”€ Store::new (store/src/lib.rs:79)
    â”œâ”€â”€ store.builder.build_or_migrate (store/src/builder.rs:45)
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ DefaultBuilder::build_or_migrate
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ init_shard (146)              â”€â”€ rusqlite::Connection::open â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ apply_pragmas (242)           â”€â”€ rusqlite::Connection::execute â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ apply_migrations              [store::schema]    â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ seed_nodes_fts (180)          â”€â”€ rusqlite::Connection::execute â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ init_meta (222)               â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â”œâ”€â”€ record_version (272)          â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚       â””â”€â”€ register_project (281) â†’ insert_project_row (345)  â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚
    â”œâ”€â”€ â”€â”€ PARSE LOOP (per file) â”€â”€
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ ParserPool::new                   [parsers crate]
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ query_cache::warm_up              [parsers crate]
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ IncrementalParser::new + parse_file
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ Extractor::new + extract          [parsers crate]
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ DefaultLearner::observe_file      [brain::conventions]
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ looks_like_test_path / hex_sha256 / looks_binary
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ store.inject.insert(files_sql, â€¦) â—„â”€â”€ FIRST SQLite write per file
    â”‚       â””â”€â”€ (see DefaultInject::insert leaf below)
    â”‚
    â”œâ”€â”€ â”€â”€ PASSES (each takes &store; all reach SQLite via store.inject.insert) â”€â”€
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_multimodal_pass        (1395)  â†’ MmRegistry/ExtractedDoc â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_resolve_imports_pass   (2473)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_leiden_pass            (1647)  â†’ ClusterRunner [brain::cluster_runner] + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_embedding_pass         (1925)  â†’ Embedder [brain] + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_audit_pass             (2291)  â†’ IPC (audit_route) with fallback; NO direct store
    â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ run_audit_pass_ipc_then_fallback (2353)
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_tests_pass             (4380)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_git_pass               (3806)  â†’ git2 + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_deps_pass              (4001)  â†’ discover_dep_manifests / parse_cargo_toml /
    â”‚   â”‚                                          parse_package_json / parse_requirements_txt
    â”‚   â”‚                                          + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_betweenness_pass       (3592)  â†’ graph BFS + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_intent_pass            (2787)  â†’ parse_mneme_intent + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_git_intent_pass        (2950)  â†’ git history + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_convention_intent_pass (3119)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_intent_md_pass         (3207)  â†’ parse_intent_md / parse_intent_config + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_architecture_pass      (5312)  â†’ ArchitectureScanner [scanners] + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_conventions_pass       (5490)  â†’ DefaultLearner.flush + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_wiki_pass              (5572)  â†’ WikiBuilder [brain::wiki] + store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”‚                                          (next_wiki_version, community_status_line)
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_federated_pass         (5839)  â•³ DIVERGES â€” bypasses store.inject:
    â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ FederatedStore::new(&db_path)  [brain::federated]
    â”‚   â”‚       â””â”€â”€ â”€â”€ raw rusqlite::Connection â”€â”€â–º SQLite
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_perf_pass              (5939)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_errors_pass            (6006)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ run_livestate_pass         (6071)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ run_agents_pass            (6115)  â†’ store.inject.insert
    â”‚
    â””â”€â”€ BuildState::save / build_state::save  [checkpoint â€” not SQLite, JSON file]


â”€â”€ STORE.INJECT LEAF (every pass converges here) â”€â”€
store.inject.insert(project, layer, sql, params, opts)        [DefaultInject::insert  inject.rs:282]
â””â”€â”€ DefaultInject::write_with_audit                            [inject.rs:134]
    â””â”€â”€ crate::query::{DbQuery, Write}                         [store/src/query.rs]
        â””â”€â”€ DefaultQuery::write                                [query.rs:221]
            â””â”€â”€ mpsc â†’ spawn_writer_task                       [query.rs:345]
                â””â”€â”€ r2d2::Pool<SqliteConnectionManager>        [r2d2_sqlite]
                    â””â”€â”€ rusqlite::Connection::execute(
                            sql, params_from_iter(params))     â—„â”€â”€ SQLite layer
```

### Notes on the graph

- **Two divergent paths from the SQLite perspective:**
  1. **`store.inject.insert`** is the canonical gateway â€” called from `run_inline`'s parse loop and from every `run_*_pass` except `audit` and `federated`. It funnels through `DefaultInject::write_with_audit` â†’ `DefaultQuery::write` â†’ an mpsc channel â†’ a single writer task that owns an `r2d2_sqlite` connection pool and calls `rusqlite::Connection::execute` with `params_from_iter`.
  2. **`run_federated_pass`** intentionally bypasses the inject layer â€” file comment at build.rs:5285 says *"the federated pass is the only deviation â€¦ uses raw rusqlite for performance reasons that predate the inject layer"*. It opens its own `rusqlite::Connection` via `FederatedStore::new(&db_path)` in the `brain` crate.

- **`run_audit_pass`** does not touch SQLite at all in this file â€” it round-trips through IPC (`audit_route`) to the supervisor, with an inline fallback that still defers persistence to the supervisor.

- **`run_dispatched`** also doesn't touch SQLite directly from `cli`; it just submits `Job::Parse` over IPC and polls `JobQueueStatus`. The supervisor process performs the same `store.inject.insert` â†’ rusqlite chain on its side.

- **Schema bootstrap** runs once at the top of `run_inline` via `store.builder.build_or_migrate`, which is the *other* place rusqlite is touched directly inside the `store` crate (vs. through the writer task).
